mapper.select:
SELECT bill_no AS billNo, order_no AS orderNo, customer_name AS customerName, CONCAT('¥', FORMAT(bill_amount, 2)) AS billAmount, CONCAT('¥', FORMAT(paid_amount, 2)) AS paidAmount, CONCAT('¥', FORMAT(bill_amount - paid_amount, 2)) AS unpaidAmount, bill_status AS billStatus, bill_status_type AS billStatusType, DATE_FORMAT(due_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS dueAt, DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createdAt FROM t_bill
bill_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.billNo}, '%')
AND order_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.orderNo}, '%')
AND bill_status = #{query.billStatus}
ORDER BY created_at DESC
